title: Accounting for every UK business
summaryBody: FreeAgent gives you confidence in your numbers and streamlines your admin so you can make it count.

detailBlocks.text: Whether you’re rapidly growing or just want to get Making Tax Digital done, FreeAgent gives you confidence in your numbers and streamlines your admin so you can make it count.

2026 promises to be a transformative year for practices and their clients. With regulatory changes like Making Tax Digital (MTD) reshaping the UK compliance landscape, and the rise of new technology already fundamentally shaking up what it means to run a business, the year ahead promises to be one to keep us all on our toes.

We always try to ground ourselves in your challenges - from the biggest existential threats down to the grit in the machinery that’s grinding your gears. To find the solutions to these problems we’re homing in on three main goals.

The first is helping accountants and bookkeepers - and their clients - to get MTD done. We want our HMRC-recognised solution to reduce your stress levels and offer great value - without compromising on capability.
Second is building a FreeAgent that’s fit for a broader range of businesses - giving you control without complexity and giving financial confidence to business owners.
Finally, we’ll stay at the front of the wave of new technologies that are reshaping our lives. We’ll help you swap manual tasks for automation and build a business that’s ready for anything.
